_description: Recruiter memory file for NexHire AI. Stores learned preferences, disqualifiers, and hiring patterns.

disqualifiers.description: Disqualify candidates who lack Python when Python is a required skill
disqualifiers.rationale: Python is a non-negotiable requirement when listed in JD required skills

disqualifiers.description: Disqualify candidates with less than minimum required experience
disqualifiers.rationale: Candidate does not meet minimum experience threshold

disqualifiers.description: Flag candidates with no overlapping domain experience
disqualifiers.rationale: Candidate lacks direct domain experience but may have transferable skills

prefer_leadership.description: Boost candidates with demonstrated leadership for senior roles

prefer_collaboration.description: Slight boost for candidates with clear collaboration style

hiring_patterns.notes: This section is populated as the system learns from recruiter feedback over time.
